name: 72"x14" Table Runner Natural Woven - Threshold™
description:
Bring a natural touch to your dining table with this Woven Table Runner from Threshold™. This woven table runner showcases a subtle textured pattern in a natural finish, and its decorated with fringe accents on all sides for added appeal. Made from a mix of cotton and jute material, this woven table runner helps protect your table from accidental spills and is suitable for any occasion. Best of all, it's machine washable for easy maintenance.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
